name: Black Bean Chowder
recipeIngredient: 1 cup cooked 97% fat-free ham, cut into half-inch cubes
1 can (14.5 oz.) whole tomatoes, undrained, diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray a large nonstick saucepan with nonstick cooking spray.
2. Add ham and onion; cook over medium heat for 4-6 minutes or until the onion is tender, stirring occasionally.
3. Stir in the remaining ingredients.
4. Bring to a boil.
5. Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer for 20 minutes or until slightly thickened.
6. Garnish each serving with crushed baked tortilla chips if desired.
Makes 4 servings -- 240 calories -- 20 from fat -- 2 grams fat.
